title: Scape and Run: Parasites Aether
description: Adds parasites to the Aether Dimension
body:
An addon for [Scape and Run: Parasites](https://modrinth.com/mod/scapeandrunparasites) that adds infection mechanics to the Aether dimension. It introduces new infection systems for the dimension, as well as parasitic variants of Aether mod creatures.

**Mechanics:**
- All creatures in the Aether dimension are highly susceptible to COTH, causing them to transform into parasites very quickly.
- Players affected by COTH, as well as other parasites, can infect susceptible creatures at a distance.
- If 4 Adapted Vermin naturally spawn in the Overworld, they will begin spawning naturally in the Aether dimension as well (including Phase 0).


**Future plans:**
- Add parasitic variants for all Aether creatures.
- Rework the block infection logic for this dimension.

**The addon can be customized in the config.**


**Help/Support/Suggestions:**

[Join the discord](https://discord.gg/peU9jS8rhA)
